debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v_1 v p ih : V
h : G.Adj v p
p_1 : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G p ih
h_support :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G v ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G v p ih h p_1) =
    insert v (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1)
h_edge :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G v ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G v p ih h p_1) =
    insert s(v, p) (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1)
h_ind :
  Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1) + 1
hv : v ∉ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1
h_card_union :
  ({s(v, p)} ∪ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1).card =
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1) + 1
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G p ih inst p_1) ≤
    (insert s(v, p) (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G p ih inst p_1)).card

proof:
rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := h_card_union.symm
failed_attempts:
rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le h_ind)

rw [← Finset.singleton_union] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.insert_eq, h_card_union]

rw [h_edge, ← h_card_union, Finset.singleton_union]
        exact Nat.le_add_right_of_le h_ind

rw [← Finset.insert_eq, ← h_card_union]
        exact le_trans h_ind (Nat.le_add_right _ _)

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le h_ind)

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le h_ind)

rw [h_edge, ← h_card_union, Finset.singleton_union]
        exact Nat.le_add_right _ _

rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.insert_eq, h_card_union]; linarith

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (p_1.edgeSet ∪ {s(v, p)}).card := by rw [h_card_union]
          _ = ({s(v, p)} ∪ p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.union_comm]
rw [Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at h_card_union ⊢; omega

rw [← Finset.singleton_union] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.insert_eq, h_card_union]

rw [← Finset.singleton_union] at h_card_union
        rw [h_edge]
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = ({s(v, p)} ∪ p_1.edgeSet).card := h_card_union.symm
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.singleton_union]

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by simp [Finset.card_insert_le]

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by simp [Finset.card_insert_le]

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (p_1.edgeSet ∪ {s(v, p)}).card := by rw [h_card_union]
          _ = ({s(v, p)} ∪ p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.union_comm]
rw [Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm, h_card_union]; exact h_ind

rw [← Finset.insert_eq, h_card_union]
        exact Nat.le_add_right _ _

rw [Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at h_edge
        rw [h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact Nat.le_add_right _ _

rw [← Finset.insert_eq, ← h_card_union]
        exact le_trans h_ind (Nat.le_add_right _ _)

rw [← Finset.singleton_union] at h_card_union
        rw [h_edge]
        rw [Finset.insert_eq]
        omega

rw [← Finset.singleton_union] at h_card_union
        rw [h_edge]
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = ({s(v, p)} ∪ p_1.edgeSet).card := h_card_union.symm
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.singleton_union]

rw [← Finset.singleton_union] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [Finset.insert_eq, h_card_union]

rw [Finset.insert_eq] at h_edge
        rw [h_edge, h_card_union]
        exact Nat.le_add_right _ _

rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [← h_card_union]; omega

rw [Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at h_edge
        rw [Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm]
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = ({s(v, p)} ∪ p_1.edgeSet).card := h_card_union.symm
          _ = _ := rfl
successful_attempts:
rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := h_card_union.symm

rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := by rw [← h_card_union, Finset.insert_eq]

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (p_1.edgeSet ∪ {s(v, p)}).card := by rw [h_card_union]

rw [← Finset.insert_eq] at h_card_union
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ = (insert s(v, p) p_1.edgeSet).card := h_card_union.symm

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        calc p_1.supportSet.card ≤ p_1.edgeSet.card + 1 := h_ind
          _ ≤ (p_1.edgeSet ∪ {s(v, p)}).card := by rw [h_card_union]

rw [h_edge, Finset.insert_eq, Finset.union_comm] at *
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_of_le (Nat.le_trans h_ind (Nat.le_of_eq h_card_union.symm)))
